merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary perspective within a dimly lit medieval potions classroom as a series of students pass through the atmospheric space. It begins with a single student in dark robes walking from right to left, crossing past central wooden work tables topped with cauldrons. As the first student departs, the quiet of the room is momentarily broken by a second student who enters from the right and follows the same path across the lantern-lit stone walls. The scene then shifts to a final crossing as a third student moves through the gothic arches, before the camera lingers on the empty, warm glow of the classroom.
